prompts: Proper handwashing involves several key steps. Begin by wetting your hands with clean, running water. Apply soap and lather by rubbing your hands together, covering all surfaces, including the backs of hands, between fingers, and under nails. Scrub your hands for at least 20 seconds. Rinse thoroughly under running water to remove all soap. Finally, dry your hands using a clean towel or air dry them. Effective handwashing is crucial for maintaining hygiene and preventing the spread of germs.
